sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_base64 (id INT, encoded_data VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_base64 (id, encoded_data) VALUES (1, encode_base64('Hello, World!'));
UPDATE test_base64 SET encoded_data = encode_base64('Updated Data') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT decode_base64(encoded_data) FROM test_base64 WHERE id = 1;
